title: Arch build error
author: asterryplace
body:
```
==> Validating source files with sha256sums...
    tidgi-desktop.sh ... FAILED
==> ERROR: One or more files did not pass the validity check!
error: failed to download sources for 'tidgi-desktop-bin-0.14.0-1': 
error: packages failed to build: tidgi-desktop-bin-0.14.0-1
```
Package fails to build, while tidgi-desktop-git is unusable, unfortunately. Can provide more info if needed.

title: bug: 记住上次访问页面的开关不见了

body: ### Environment 环境信息 _No response_ ### Description 描述 按理说开关启用的时候会每次都打开上次的页面，就像之前应用不是关掉，是最小化一样。而这个开关关闭的时候应该每次都使用太微里的主页设定，每次都打开用户设置的主页。也就是直接打开页面根路径，不带任何后续参数。 ### Steps to Reproduce 复现方式 配置工作区 - 杂项设置 - 上次访问的页面 记住上次访问的页面,恢复打开时的上次访问状态 ### Additional Context 额外上下文 _No response_

title: Simplify the first user experience
author: linonetwo
body:
> [@Jermolene](https://github.com/Jermolene) By the way, thank you for trying out, What do you feel about my build-in template? I am planning to simplify it more.
> 
> Congratulations, TidGI-Desktop is a very impressive piece of work and I have been meaning to try it out for some time.
> 
> Part of my interest is the possibility of adopting it as an official tool. Unless I missed something, TidGI-Desktop cannot edit a single file wiki in place. If that is the case then we would have to offer TidGI-Desktop alongside the existing TiddlyDesktop, unless and until TidGI-Desktop can match those filters.
> 
> There are a few things that would need to be done:
> 
> * The UI can be an overwhelming. I’d like to explore simplifying it, and perhaps de-emphasising some of the more advanced features
> * Better built-in documentation
> * The English translation could do with improvements to make it more complete and clearer
> * Renaming. I think we need a simpler, easier to pronounce name. A name incorporating “tiddly” clearly communicates that this is part of the TiddlyWiki ecosystem
> 
> You asked about the template. I think it is overly complex. For new users it might be better to start with a vanilla build of TW to make the setup easier to recognise. Then the “new wiki” function can offer a full menu of editions.
> 
>  

 _Originally posted by @Jermolene in [#710](https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TidGi-Desktop/issues/710#issuecomment-4620760949)_

Simplification, Of course, that is what I'm working on. While most of them needs human decision, can't be too fast. I'm refactoring CPL, so LLM agent could auto fetch plugin as needed, no need to build-in in the default template.

TidGi, it used to named "TiddlyGit", but I thought it was too long, takes too much phoneme, so shorten for Tid + Gi, where Tid is for Tiddly. Now you still have chance to rename it since we haven't release v1.0, only need name to be short.

title: feature: Wiki worker sandbox
author: linonetwo
body:
### Description 描述

As suggested in https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TidGi-Desktop/security/advisories/GHSA-9hc2-hjx8-q6pv
I should add more sandbox feature by default to interstep harmful system feature requests from the wiki worker. Everything should be limited to the wiki folder by default. Plugin could do anything in the wiki folder, but can't do anything outside the folder silently.

### Additional Context 额外上下文

I thought of adding sandbox feature in the upstream tiddlywik core-server, Perhaps the sandbox feature can only be done outside of it. It needs its environment runtime to provide limitation.

@Jermolene

title: bug: 运行e2e的时候miniwindow无法隐藏
author: linonetwo
body:
### Environment 环境信息

_No response_

### Description 描述

**为什么 Windows 上不能完全隐藏？**

这是 Electron 41 + Windows 的已知限制。`src/services/windows/index.ts:254` 的注释写得很清楚：

> "WebContentsView hosts need a shown BrowserWindow to expose reliable bounds during E2E"

具体机制：
1. **Windows E2E 专用分支**：`shouldKeepWindowPaintableForE2E` 为真时，main/secondary/tidgiMiniWindow 会被创建为 `show: true, x: -3000, y: -1000`（操作系统层面可见，但放在屏幕外）
2. **为什么要这样**：如果 BrowserWindow 是 `show: false`，WebContentsView 的布局/绘制不会更新，`getBounds()` 会返回错误值，E2E 里检查 "browser view is positioned within visible window bounds" 这类断言就会失败
3. **折中方案**：`e2ePaintOnlyWindows` WeakSet。窗口虽然在操作系统层面是 visible 的，但只要还在这个 WeakSet 里，`isTidgiMiniWindowOpen()` 就返回 `false`，E2E harness 的 `isWindowVisible()` 也会返回 `false` —— 所以测试里 "window not visible" 的断言仍然能通过
4. **什么时候真正"可见"**：测试步骤调用 `toggleTidgiMiniWindow()` → `openTidgiMiniWindow(true, true)` → `markWindowShownForE2E()` 把窗口从 WeakSet 移除 → 这时 `isTidgiMiniWindowOpen()` 返回 `true`

**之前失败的原因**：如果强行改成 `show: false`，WebContentsView 的 bounds 和 renderer 状态不可靠，导致 bounds 检查和 `webContents.executeJavaScript()` 超时或返回错误。

**你看到的任务栏窗口来源**：
- 主要是 calibration preflight（`scripts/end-to-end-preflight.ts`）会自动启动 Electron，且它**不受你传的 `--tags` 影响**
- 主窗口被 `showInactive()` 激活（`handleCreateBasicWindow.ts:66`）
- tidgiMiniWindow 在 paint-only 阶段就已经是 OS-visible 的

---

**我之前犯的错**：我用了错误的 tag。feature 文件里是 `@tidgi-mini-window`（带连字符），我传了 `@tidgiMiniWindow`（驼峰），导致没有 scenario 匹配上，只有 calibration 在空跑。我现在用正确的 tag 重新跑。

### Steps to Reproduce 复现方式

e2e

### Additional Context 额外上下文

_No response_

title: 关闭Itonnote$:/plugins/linonetwo/itonnote会导致"记住上次访问的页面失效
author: Hydrowood0
body:
### Environment 环境信息

现在上次访问的页面 记住上次访问的页面，恢复打开时的上次访问状态 始终没变化,
从某一个时刻开始重启后一直是 tidgi://r7LVOg_GaL3BTKfP6xKfwtidgi://r7lvog_gal3btkfp6xkfw/#%24%3A%2Fplugins%2Flinonetwo%2Fitonnote:%24%3A%2FSideBarTabManager%202026%2F04%2F25%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E6%89%93%E5%BC%80SCRCPY%E7%9B%91%E5%90%AC%E4%BA%8B%E4%BB%B610016%20%24%3A%2FControlPanel%20%24%3A%2Fplugins%2FEvidentlyCube%2FAdvancedPerformance%20%24%3A%2Fplugins%2Flinonetwo%2Fitonnote%20%24%3A%2FAdvancedSearch%20Index

重新导入之后一直是  tidgi://r7lvog_gal3btkfp6xkfw/

### Description 描述

不知道我说的清除不

### Steps to Reproduce 复现方式

很可能是因为 手贱改了id工作区, 从"r7LVOg_GaA3BTKfP6xKfw"改成"r7LVOg_GaL3BTKfP6xKfw",删除 原 工作区但保留本地文件,然后复制出去桌面,添加桌面的工作区,删除 桌面 工作区但保留本地文件,复制回原地址,添加原地址工作区, 然后一顿git操作和手机同步操作都成功了, 但是"现在上次访问的页面 记住上次访问的页面，恢复打开时的上次访问状态"始终没变化, 
 删除C:\Users\ffff\AppData\Roaming\TidGi 也没用还是"r7LVOg_GaL3BTKfP6xKfw"

不知道我说的清除不

title: bug: 从0.12.4升级到prerelease21和prerelease25git功能开始失效
author: Hydrowood0
body:
### Environment 环境信息

win10 22h2
git version 2.45.2

TidGi (win32)
Version v0.13.0-prerelease25

Electron Version: 41.1.1
Node Version: 24.14.0
Chromium Version: 146.0.7680.166

### Description 描述

从0.12.4升级到prerelease21后 tidgi的本地git备份和同步git云端功能开始失效, prerelease25也一样失效, 之前一年多里我使用tidgi的git的功能都没问题. 

提示: 同步失败！你需要用 Github Desktop 等工具检查当前 Git 仓库的状态。失败可能是网络原因导致的，如果的确如此，可在调整网络后重试。 无法同步，这个文件夹没有初始化为 Git 仓库

### Steps to Reproduce 复现方式

右键菜单->立即本地git备份. 

### Additional Context 额外上下文

Dev_tools没见报错

title: bug: Object has been destroyed 无法正常加载TiddlyWiki，但可以在浏览器打开
author: dongrentianyu
body:
### Environment 环境信息

[7OyG6aZnTBijcsiFduauR-TiddlyWiki-Chinese-Tutorial-2026-02-18.log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25768905/7OyG6aZnTBijcsiFduauR-TiddlyWiki-Chinese-Tutorial-2026-02-18.log)

Version v0.12.4

Electron Version: 34.0.2
Node Version: 20.18.1
Chromium Version: 132.0.6834.159

### Description 描述

现在的情况是太记无法加载TiddlyWiki，但用浏览器打开可以正常加载出来，正常添加或编辑内容。感觉很奇怪。

### Steps to Reproduce 复现方式

我想把之前的codemirror删除，然后换成最新版的。结果删除之后重启TiddlyWiki，就显示一直在转圈。之后我想是不是删除插件导致出现了什么问题，就用git把插件回退过去了。然后重启TiddlyWiki，还是不行。

### Additional Context 额外上下文

_No response_

title: bug: tidgi.config.json 要能存储多个工作区
author: dongrentianyu
body:
### Environment 环境信息

Version v0.13.0-prerelease17

Electron Version: 39.2.3
Node Version: 22.21.1
Chromium Version: 142.0.7444.175

### Description 描述

太记可以一个TiddlyWiki文件夹导入多个工作区，而不同的工作区名称可以不一样，端口也不一样，设置也不一样。目前 tidgi.config.json 中只能存储一个工作区的设置，不能存储多个工作区的设置。

### Steps to Reproduce 复现方式

新建一个TiddlyWiki，然后导入不同的工作区。之后每次重启不同的工作区，tidgi.config.json 的内容都会发生变化。

### Additional Context 额外上下文

_No response_
